name: Langfuse OpenClaw Observability Plugin
description: Report OpenClaw traces to Langfuse via OpenTelemetry

langfuseBaseUrl.description: Langfuse base URL, for example https://cloud.langfuse.com, https://us.cloud.langfuse.com, or your self-hosted URL

endpoint.description: Deprecated direct OTLP traces endpoint override. If set, the plugin skips Langfuse key-based URL construction.

headers.description: Additional headers merged into the trace exporter request

serviceName.description: Resource service.name used on exported traces

openclawNativeMetrics.description: Deprecated. Langfuse OTLP ingestion does not accept metrics, so this flag is ignored.

log.description: Deprecated. Langfuse OTLP ingestion does not accept logs, so this flag is ignored.

reportDiagnosticsLog.description: Deprecated. Langfuse OTLP ingestion does not accept logs, so this flag is ignored.

allowUserDetailInfoReport.description: Whether to include detailed OpenClaw payloads on spans (user/session/message/tool content)
